title: MassTech Angel Ring
body:
Just Another Angel ring Mod 

It Adds a Diamond Ring. The Angel Ring, And BatWings for the Crafting of the Angel Ring

MTAR Does Require Curios and HybridLib so be in mind 

Does Not Require Power or XP To Fly, So Fly to your Hearts Content, Its Not Cheapish requires the Elytra Batwings and 1 nether star

 

I have no problem with anyone putting this mod in your pack s
 

This is Just a Simple Reminder that This Mod is Only Uploaded to Curseforge and Modrinth Do not Download from any other places
